examples: I naively assumed that I would be paid for the work.
Perhaps naively, I had expected to find that many trees had been killed.
Mr. and Mrs. Brights may naively have no idea of the eyestraining effect they’re having on you.
"I personally went into it a little bit naively, " said Trask of the new version.
What animated Hunt was an almost naively simple belief in everyone's personal desire to be happy.
